steps.title: Subtract the constant
steps.content: Start with $2.6+x=2.8$. Subtract $2.6$ from both sides to isolate $x$: $$x=2.8-2.6.$$

steps.title: Compute the decimal difference
steps.content: $2.8-2.6=0.2$, so the solution is 0.2. The equivalent fraction $\dfrac{1}{5}$ also represents the same value.

steps.title: Check
steps.content: Substituting back gives $2.6+0.2=2.8$, which matches the original equation.
